nodes.name: Cinnamon-banded kingfisher
nodes.summary: Cinnamon-banded kingfisher（Todiramphus australasia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Cinnamon-banded kingfisher。

nodes.name: Cinnamon-banded kingfisher
nodes.summary: The cinnamon-banded kingfisher (Todiramphus australasia) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is found in Indonesia and East Timor. It is endemic to the Lesser Sundas. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References

nodes.name: Todiramphus
nodes.summary: Todiramphus（Todiramphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Blue-black kingfisher、Rufous-lored kingfisher、Blue-and-white kingfisher等27种鸟类。
